title: LONG NON-CODING RNA OF THE TREMATODE HIMASTHLA ELONGATA
author: Solovyeva, Anna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary Materials for the Article:  Long Non-Coding RNA of the Trematode  Himasthla elongata    
 The following datasets are provided as supplementary materials to support the findings presented in the article. 
  Contents:  
 
 
  h_elongata_repeats.fasta  — Database of repetitive elements identified in  H. elongata . 
 
 
  H_elongata_draft_assembly.fasta  — Draft genome assembly of  H. elongata . 
 
 
  lncRNA_dataset.fasta  — Long non-coding RNAs (lncRNAs) identified in the  H. elongata  transcriptome. 
 
 
  h_elongata_nanopore.fastq.gz  — Raw Oxford Nanopore sequencing reads from  H. elongata . 
 
 
  h_leptosoma_nanopore.fastq.gz  — Raw Oxford Nanopore sequencing reads from  H. leptosoma . 
 
 
  h_littorinae_nanopore.fastq.gz  — Raw Oxford Nanopore sequencing reads from  H. littorinae . 
 
  alignments.docx  —  Figures S1–S10 showing alignments of PCR amplicon sequences with the corresponding lncRNAs.
